solutions.solution: (a) The lower half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the upper half of the transparent sheet. The design on both halves are identical. Hence, option (a) resembles the pattern formed when the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line.
(c) It is clear that right half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and is placed on the left half. As the figure, thus obtained resembles the figure as shown in option (c).
(a) Clearly, the left half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and is placed on the right half. The resultant figure, thus obtained resembles the option (a).
(a) The left half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the right half of the sheet. The figure, thus obtained resembles the answer figure (a).
(a) The right half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the left half of the sheet. The figure, thus obtained resembles the answer figure (a).

(b) The lower half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the upper half of the sheet. Then, the left half of the sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the right half of the sheet. The figure, thus obtained resembles the answer figure (b).
(a) The right half of the sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the left half of the sheet. The figure, thus obtained resembles the answer figure (a).
(c) The upper half of the transparent sheet is folded along the dotted line and placed on the lower half of the sheet. The figure, thus obtained resembles the answer figure (c).
